query:
SELECT r.id, r.product_name, r.customer_name, r.customer_email, r.booking_date, r.status, r.merchant_order,
       b.id as booking_id, b.status as booking_status,
       c.id as client_id, c.name as client_name
FROM reservations r
LEFT JOIN bookings b ON b.reservationId = r.id
LEFT JOIN clients c ON c.email = r.customer_email
ORDER BY r.id DESC LIMIT 10;
